---
name: Incorrect mapping or legal reference
about: A requirement, pair, or article-level mapping cites the wrong source
title: "[mapping] "
labels: data-correction
---

**What's wrong:**
e.g. requirement code `5.1` cites `§30(2) Nr. 4 BSIG` but should be `§30(2) Nr. 5 BSIG`.

**Primary source:**
Cite the official text. Link if possible:
- BSIG: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/bsig_2025/
- CIR 2024/2690: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2024/2690
- GDPR: https://gdpr-info.eu/
- ENISA TIG: link to the specific section

**Suggested fix:**
What the corrected value should be.
